description_long: This object is a compact, hand-held stapler with a predominantly beige body and a dark gray upper section. The stapler features a contoured handle designed for comfortable pressing, with a smooth, slightly matte finish. The upper part appears to be made of metal or hard plastic, while the lower section is likely plastic, with visible seams and a hollowed underside. The staple exit slot is located at the front of the dark gray section, partially visible in some views. There are no visible brand logos or rubber grips on the base. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for use in offices, schools, or urban workspaces.
description: A compact beige and gray stapler with a contoured handle and a smooth, matte finish, featuring a visible staple exit slot at the front.
description_view_0: The front and top of the stapler are visible, showing the dark gray upper section and the contoured beige handle.
description_view_1: The left side and underside are visible, highlighting the hollowed lower section and the seam between the upper and lower parts.
description_view_2: The right side and the length of the handle are visible, showing the smooth beige surface and the connection to the upper section.
description_view_3: The rear and top of the stapler are visible, with the dark gray upper section dominating the view and the handle extending backward.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is contoured with a gentle curve for ergonomic pressing, made of beige plastic with a smooth, matte surface and no visible patterns or texturing.
attribute_metal_hinge_mechanism: The hinge mechanism is partially visible at the rear where the upper and lower sections meet, appearing as a simple pivot joint likely made of metal, with no visible fasteners or pins.
attribute_staple_exit_slot: The staple exit slot is located at the front of the dark gray upper section, rectangular in shape and partially visible in the images.
